role: source-home organ for ToS-authored philosophy, source witness discipline, the golden Zarathustra route, non-authoritative research packets, domain philosophy topology, canon, ToS-owned compatibility, ToS-owned contracts, ToS-owned derived exports, and review evidence
home_rules: ToS-owned source surfaces live under ToS/ rather than in separate root-level active homes.

The home is tree-shaped: philosophy, witness, Zarathustra route, research packet, intake, canon, ToS-owned compatibility, ToS-owned export, ToS-owned contract, doctrine, and review branches stay distinct.
Root README, charter, boundaries, roadmap, release route, and decision rationale remain repository-level surfaces.
Generated and compatibility surfaces remain lower authority than doctrine, source witnesses, canon, and contracts.
Every active source-home branch has an owner surface and a validation route.

branches.role: ToS knowledge law, node contracts, templates, interpretation ladder, and route doctrine that belongs to authored meaning.
Primary source-facing witness material and provenance-aware source files.
Golden Zarathustra route branch for the current bounded prologue entry, public-entry capsule, and ToS axis orientation.
Non-authoritative AI-assisted or secondary research scaffolds that may feed philosophy branch review but never source, doctrine, canon, or graph authority.
Domain-shaped growing philosophy tree: trunk law, era branches, tradition subtrees, local graph workbenches, and cross-thread navigation.
Provisional extraction, tabular base material, and promotion ledgers.
Canonical authored nodes, relation packs, and vocabulary registries.
ToS-owned public-safe compatibility mirrors, examples, and tiny-entry compatibility surfaces.
ToS-owned generated downstream-facing exports and compact read models.
ToS-owned public schema contracts for ToS surfaces.
Dated inspection notes and review evidence.

stronger_owner_routes.pressure: AoA federation, center doctrine, or ecosystem constitution
runtime, service, storage, or deployment behavior
typed workspace integration or SDK helpers
durable memory object or recall policy
